title: CDS Study Plan — 6-Week Roadmap
description: A structured 6-week study plan covering all 64 CDS artifacts across 12 phases, with hourly breakdowns, weekly objectives, and a visual timeline.

sections.title: Overview & Timeline
sections.description:
This study plan organises 64 CDS artifacts across 12 learning phases into a 6-week (~33 hour) curriculum. Each week bundles related phases so concepts build naturally on one another.

64Artifacts
12Phases
~33hTotal Duration
6Weeks
W1
Phases 1-2
6h
W2
Phases 3-4
6h
W3
Phases 5-6
5h
W4
Phases 7-8
6h
W5
Phases 9-10
6h
W6
Phases 11-12
4h

Prerequisites

  • Basic ABAP syntax (data types, internal tables, classes)
  • SQL fundamentals (SELECT, JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY)
  • SAP GUI / ADT (ABAP Development Tools) familiarity

How to use

  • Each week has ~4–6 hours of material — comfortable for one hour per day
  • Open each artifact in the docs panel, read key learning points, then study the CDS source code
  • Practice by modifying the examples in your own SAP S/4HANA or BTP ABAP environment

sections.title: Week 1 — Foundations
sections.description:
1Week 1 — Foundations~6 hours
Phase 1: FundamentalsPhase 2: Parameters
Artifacts: CDS Intro, View Entity Syntax, Simple View, View on View, Data Manipulation, Type Casting, Input Parameters, Default/Constant/Variable Parameters
Goal: Understand the CDS view syntax, create simple views, work with parameters.
✔️ Milestone: Write a view that joins transparent tables and accepts a date range parameter

sections.title: Week 2 — Relationships & Grouping
sections.description:
2Week 2 — Relationships & Grouping~6 hours
Phase 3: Joins & AssociationsPhase 4: Aggregation & Subqueries
Artifacts: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, CROSS JOIN, Association, Path Expressions, GROUP BY, HAVING, EXISTS, UNION
Goal: Master join types, understand associations vs JOINs, write aggregate queries.
✔️ Milestone: Model an association between header and item views; write a join query with aggregation

sections.title: Week 3 — Functions & VDM
sections.description:
3Week 3 — Functions & VDM~5 hours
Phase 5: Built-in FunctionsPhase 6: VDMPhase 9 (partial)
Artifacts: String & Date Functions, COALESCE, Currency Conversion, Private/Basic/Composite/Consumption Views, Client Handling, Session Variables
Goal: Use built-in functions, apply VDM layering, handle client and session context.
✔️ Milestone: Build a 4-layer VDM stack (Private → Basic → Composite → Consumption) with currency conversion

sections.title: Week 4 — Fiori, OData & RAP
sections.description:
4Week 4 — Fiori, OData & RAP~6 hours
Phase 7: Fiori & ODataPhase 8: RAP & Extensibility
Artifacts: Metadata Extension, UI Annotations, Value Help, Search, OData Draft, Service Expose, Composition, Object Model, RAP Behavior, Extensibility, View Extension, Numbering
Goal: Annotate views for Fiori, expose OData services, define RAP behavior with early/late numbering.
✔️ Milestone: Create a full RAP stack: CDS → Behavior → Service → UI annotations → Draft-enabled Fiori app

sections.title: Week 5 — Advanced Modeling & Analytics
sections.description:
5Week 5 — Advanced Modeling & Analytics~6 hours
Phase 9: Advanced Data ModelingPhase 10: Analytics & Security
Artifacts: Hierarchy, Text Association, Virtual Elements, Custom/Abstract Entities, Table Entities, Projection Views, JSON/XML, DCL, Analytical CDS & V3, Release Contracts
Goal: Model complex CDS patterns, secure data with DCL, build analytical star schemas.
✔️ Milestone: Design an analytical CDS view with cube/query; secure it with instance-based DCL

sections.title: Week 6 — Enterprise Features
sections.description:
6Week 6 — Enterprise Features~4 hours
Phase 11: Table Functions & AMDPPhase 12: Quality & Enterprise
Artifacts: Simple/Parameterized/Currency/Advanced TF, Simple/Dynamic AMDP, Performance, Unit Testing, RAP Eventing, Cloud Core
Goal: Implement table functions, write AMDPs, optimise performance, test and deploy cloud-ready CDS.
✔️ Milestone: Create an AMDP-based table function, write ABAP unit tests with CDS test doubles, apply performance rules

sections.title: Beyond the Plan
sections.description:
These advanced topics extend beyond the 64 core artifacts. Refer to SAP Help Portal and SAP Community for deep dives.

TopicDescription
CDS-based BW Bridge / ODPExtract CDS data into SAP BW using ODP context and extraction views
Fiori Elements Advanced UXCustom sections, multi-edit tables, guided procedures, and flexible column layouts
Multi-tenant DCLField-level vs instance-level authorization in cloud and on-premise multi-tenant systems
Advanced RAP DeterminationsSide-effects, dynamic actions, feature control, and internal vs external numbering
CDS with External OData/RFCConsuming CDS views via RAP outbound service or OData client proxy
CDS Entity Manipulation Language (EML)Programmatic MODIFY ENTITIES / READ ENTITIES for transactional operations
SAP Cloud Platform TransportgCTS / abapGit for CDS transport across cloud landscapes
CDS-based Custom Fields & LogicKey User Extensibility with custom CDS fields and logic via S/4HANA Cloud

topic: 6-week structured curriculum for learning ABAP CDS
